script_text: Welcome to Onay Radio. I'm your host, and tonight we're diving deep into the smoothest R&B this side of the city. Buckle up.
Now let me tell you something about SZA. This woman can take a feeling you didn't even know you had and turn it into a whole anthem.
Alright, we're switching gears. The energy's about to go up. Way up. You ready?
Fun fact: did you know Kendrick Lamar recorded the entire Section.80 mixtape in his closet? Look where that got him.
That's all for tonight, family. Thanks for riding with me. Same time tomorrow. Onay out.
